fact_nuggets.text: Ice Body (Japanese: Ice Body) is an Ability introduced in Generation IV.

Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD T D S Promotes natural HP recovery when it is hailing. B S L MD GtI Unavailable S MD It helps the Pokemon restore HP naturally when the weather is hail! MD RT DX This Ability helps the Pokemon restore HP naturally more quickly when the weather condition is Hail.

Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] During hail or snow , a Pokemon with Ice Body will regain 1 / 16 of its maximum HP at the end of each turn. A Pokemon with this Ability will take no damage from hail if it otherwise would. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Ice Body has no effect outside of battle.

In battle [ edit | edit source ] During hail or snow , a Pokemon with Ice Body will regain 1 / 16 of its maximum HP at the end of each turn. A Pokemon with this Ability will take no damage from hail if it otherwise would.
Heals for 1/16 max HP after each turn during hail. Protects against hail damage.
